name: saltstead
description: A procedural sea-rover game on a scaled real-world Earth — sibling to Moorstead

scripts.verify: node scripts/verify-waves.mjs && node scripts/verify-sailing.mjs && node scripts/verify-shipframe.mjs && node scripts/verify-ship.mjs && node scripts/verify-foam.mjs && node scripts/verify-wood.mjs && node scripts/verify-legends.mjs && node scripts/verify-earth.mjs && node scripts/verify-chart.mjs && node scripts/verify-terraingen.mjs && node scripts/verify-sky.mjs && node scripts/verify-light.mjs && node scripts/verify-login.mjs
